ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the passenger */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Name of emergency contact */,
  "emergency_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger who purchased the ticket */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare of the ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Unique ticket number */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation */,
  "date_of_purchase" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was purchased */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used by the passenger */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was cancelled (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabins" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number on the ship */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of cabin (e.g., Suite, Balcony, Interior) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the cabin */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck where the cabin is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cabin */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities provided in the cabin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_cabins" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the cabin assignment */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger assigned to the cabin */,
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assigned cabin */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date for the passenger */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date for the passenger */,
  "roommate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the roommate (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_cabins_cabin_id FOREIGN KEY ("cabin_id") REFERENCES cabins ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_cabins_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation log */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ticket associated with the embarkation */,
  "embarkation_time" TEXT /* Time when the passenger embarked */,
  "disembarkation_time" TEXT /* Time when the passenger disembarked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the embarkation (e.g., boarded, missed) */,
  "checkpoint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the checkpoint (e.g., security, immigration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_embarkation_logs_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_embarkation_logs_checkpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("checkpoint_id") REFERENCES checkpoints ("checkpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits offered by the program */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Points required to enroll in the program */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the program expires (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_loyalty" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the membership */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger enrolled in the program */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loyalty program */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the passenger joined the program */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_loyalty_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_service_logs" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service log */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ticket associated with the service log */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer service interaction */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Description of the issue raised by the passenger */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution provided by customer service */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer service representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_service_logs_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_service_logs_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("representative_id") REFERENCES representatives ("representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "checkpoints" (
  "checkpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each checkpoint */,
  "checkpoint_name" TEXT /* Name of the checkpoint */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the checkpoint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("checkpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representatives" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representative */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the representative */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id")
)
